creator: yzrh@noema.org
text:
Most likely caused by Rebar3.  If only erlang is updated, we get errors when starting eturnal.


Exact ERTS version (13.2.2.7) match not found, instead using 13.2.2.9. The release may fail to run.
Exec: /usr/local/lib/erlang/erts-13.2.2.9/bin/erlexec -noinput +Bd -boot /overlay/usr/local/lib/eturnal/releases/1.12.0/start -mode interactive -boot_var SYSTEM_LIB_DIR /usr/local/lib/erlang/lib -config /overlay/usr/local/lib/eturnal/releases/1.12.0/sys.config -args_file /overlay/usr/local/lib/eturnal/releases/1.12.0/vm.args -- foreground
Root: /overlay/usr/local/lib/eturnal
/overlay/usr/local/lib/eturnal
{"init terminating in do_boot",{load_failed,[supervisor,logger_simple_h,lists,logger_filters,logger_server,logger,gen_event,file_io_server,gen,filename,erl_parse,ets,erl_lint,erl_eval,code_server,code,application_master,application_controller,proc_lib,error_handler,logger_config,gen_server,kernel,heart,file_server,file,error_logger,logger_backend,application]}}
init terminating in do_boot ({load_failed,[supervisor,logger_simple_h,lists,logger_filters,logger_server,logger,gen_event,file_io_server,gen,filename,erl_parse,ets,erl_lint,erl_eval,code_server,code,application_master,application_controller,proc_lib,error_handler,logger_config,gen_server,kernel,heart,file_server,file,error_logger,logger_backend,application]})

Crash dump is being written to: erl_crash.dump...
